title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter and partner at 01 Advisors, discusses the anticipated IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic on the Big Technology Podcast. The conversation covers factors affecting IPO success, differences between the companies, capital sourcing, and implications for AI platforms and the broader tech ecosystem.
